changelog: NEW: "Sports Guide" is now its own top-level menu tab (with a sports-score icon). Faster to reach the full live games + PPV grid — one click from anywhere in the app.

NEW: Hush+ Coming Soon preview lives on the Home screen right below Discover — a beautiful one-page showcase of HushVOD+, HushBooks+, HushArcade+, and HushTube+. No buttons, just a clean preview of what's launching alongside your HushTV subscription.
Mobile bottom-nav: Hush+ replaced with the live Sports surface.
